creator: mail@fbsd2.e4m.org
text:
(In reply to Lev A. Serebryakov from comment #1)
>It requires linux emulator :-(

You are right :-(

> Do we need to run MSPDSOS-${PORTVERSION}-linux-installer.run? What does it do?

It unpacks itself to ${WRKDIR}. Then we have all files available for building (even the layout is the almost the same as before). Maybe we find a way to
unpack it with some non-Linux tools...
